message:
feat(decode): Enhanced async streaming decoder with event builders

async_decode.rs:
- Significant expansion of async streaming decoder
- Better event handling and state management
- Improved error context with line numbers
- Backpressure handling for slow consumers

event_builder.rs:
- Event construction helpers with validation
- Type-safe event building API

scanner.rs:
- Enhanced scanner with better token recognition
- Improved whitespace and delimiter handling

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
